logs.querydefinition.LogGroupNames.Docs: Use this parameter if you want the query to query only certain log groups.

logs.querydefinition.Name.Docs: A name for the query definition.

logs.querydefinition.QueryString.Docs: The query string to use for this query definition. For more information, see [ CloudWatch Logs Insights Query Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/logs/CWL_QuerySyntax.html).
